items.title: Third Ukrainian strike hits Russian oil refinery and prompts evacuations
items.raw_content: Residents near a burning refinery in Tuapse are told to leave, and the Kremlin accuses Kyiv of destabilising global energy markets.
items.ai_summary: 乌克兰第三次袭击俄罗斯炼油厂，引发居民疏散，俄方指责乌方破坏全球能源市场稳定。

items.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
items.raw_content: The UAE leaving Opec is seen as a major blow and potential death knell for the oil cartel.
items.ai_summary: 阿联酋将退出石油输出国组织OPEC，对石油卡特尔是重大打击。

items.title: Sinner beats Norrie to equal historic winning run
items.raw_content: World number one Jannik Sinner's brilliant form continues as he reaches the quarter-finals of the Madrid Open with a straight-set win over Britain's Cameron Norrie.
items.ai_summary: 世界第一辛纳直落两盘击败诺里，晋级马德里公开赛八强，延续其辉煌状态。

items.title: 'I lived all my dreams' - Stones to leave Man City
items.raw_content: England defender John Stones says he "lived all my dreams out" at Manchester City after confirming he will leave at the end of the season.
items.ai_summary: 英格兰后卫斯通斯确认赛季末离开曼城，称在俱乐部实现了所有梦想。

items.title: Brighton plan Europe's first purpose-built £80m women's football stadium
items.raw_content: Brighton and Hove Albion release plans for Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium, which will cost £75-80m.
items.ai_summary: 布莱顿发布欧洲首座专用女足体育场计划，耗资约7500-8000万英镑。

items.title: Brighton plan Europe's first purpose-built £80m women's stadium
items.raw_content: Brighton and Hove Albion release plans for Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium, which will cost £75-80m.
items.ai_summary: 布莱顿发布欧洲首座专用女足体育场计划，耗资约7500-8000万英镑。

items.title: Why Sam Altman and his former hero Elon Musk are taking their toxic feud to court
items.raw_content: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.ai_summary: Sam Altman与Elon Musk的纠纷从社交媒体升级至法庭。

items.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
items.raw_content: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
items.ai_summary: 一艘与普京盟友相关的俄罗斯超级游艇无视封锁，通过霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title: Liked by Flintoff & different to Crawley - is Gay England's next opener?
items.raw_content: After his match-winning century for Durham, BBC Sport assesses whether Emilio Gay has the skills to be England's next Test opener.
items.ai_summary: 达勒姆队球员埃米利奥·盖伊以制胜百分引发关注，BBC体育评估其成为英格兰队下一任测试赛开场击球手的潜力。

items.title: Watch: Jimmy Kimmel defends 'expectant widow' joke after first lady criticism
items.raw_content: First Lady Melania Trump described the joke as "hateful and violent", with the White House urging ABC to fire the comedian.
items.ai_summary: 吉米·坎摩尔为关于梅拉尼娅·特朗普的玩笑辩护，此前第一夫人批评该玩笑“充满仇恨和暴力”，白宫呼吁解雇他。
